_meta.keyKnowledge: We analyse and make judgements on the ethical and secure production and marketing of food and fibre enterprises.

_source.w: We analyse and make judgements on the ethical and secure production and marketing of food and fibre enterprises.
y: Food and fibre systems face critical challenges around sustainability, ethics and security.
Making informed judgements about these industries is essential for responsible citizenship.
Understanding the complexity of food systems helps us advocate for fair and sustainable practices.
eg: We analyse the supply chain of a food product and evaluate its ethical and environmental credentials.
We investigate food security issues and how they affect different communities around the world.
We evaluate marketing claims about food and fibre products against the reality of production methods.
We research how technology and innovation are addressing sustainability challenges in agriculture.
We explore how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander land management contributes to sustainable food systems.
We debate the trade-offs between intensive production for food security and sustainable, ethical practices.
